news.title: 美国汽油价格飙升加深特朗普政治危机
news.title0: Surge in US petrol prices deepens political peril for Trump over Iran
news.content: 美伊战争进入第三周，美国汽油价格飙升，可能影响特朗普的国内政治支持与连任前景。
news.content0: In the third week of the joint US-Israeli war against Iran, Donald Trump faces decisions that could define the rest of his presidency.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 美国“丧亲作家”被裁定谋杀亲夫
news.title0: Utah bereavement author found guilty of fatally poisoning her husband
news.content: 美国犹他州一位出版儿童丧亲书籍的母亲，被陪审团裁定用芬太尼毒杀丈夫，犯有谋杀罪。
news.content0: A Utah mother who published a children's book about grief after the sudden death of her husband has been found guilty of his murder.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 特朗普称有学习障碍者不应当总统
news.title0: Trump says presidents 'should not have learning disabilities' as he mocks Newsom's dyslexia
news.content: 美国总统特朗普称，他认为有学习障碍的人不应担任总统，并以此嘲笑加州州长纽森的阅读障碍。
news.content0: Donald Trump has said he believes people with learning disabilities should not be president, as he renewed his taunts at California Governor Gavin Newsom over his dyslexia.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 影帝迈克尔·B·乔丹携小金人吃汉堡庆功
news.title0: And the burger goes to... Michael B Jordan marks Oscars win at In-N-Out
news.content: 新科奥斯卡影帝迈克尔·B·乔丹在颁奖礼后，身着礼服前往快餐店In-N-Out吃汉堡庆祝。
news.content0: After he was handed a statuette for best actor at the Academy Awards, Michael B Jordan received another golden prize - a cheeseburger.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 古巴全国电网崩溃致数百万人断电
news.title0: Millions without electricity as Cuba's power grid collapses
news.content: 古巴国家电网崩溃，首都哈瓦那等大片地区陷入黑暗，数百万人无电可用，民众上街抗议。
news.content0: Millions in Cuba have been left without power after the national electricity grid collapsed on Monday, the country's power operator says.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 斯里兰卡为省油宣布每周三放假
news.title0: Sri Lanka declares Wednesdays off as Asian countries try to conserve fuel
news.content: 为应对美伊战争导致的潜在燃油短缺，斯里兰卡宣布公共机构每周三放假，并实施燃油配给制。
news.content0: Sri Lanka has declared every Wednesday a holiday for public institutions to conserve fuel as the island nation grapples with possible shortages in the wake of the US and Israel's war with Iran.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 女子因汽车太老被拒房产中介工作
news.title0: Woman not shortlisted for job as 'car is too old'
news.content: 英国一名18岁女子申请房产中介培训生职位，因所驾汽车车龄超过10年而被拒绝列入面试名单。
news.content0: An 18-year-old woman said she was left frustrated after being told she could not be shortlisted for a trainee role at an estate agency because her car was too old.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 巴基斯坦空袭喀布尔戒毒中心致数十人死亡
news.title0: Dozens killed in air strike on Kabul rehab centre blamed on Pakistan
news.content: 阿富汗首都喀布尔一家戒毒中心遭空袭，造成数十人死亡，塔利班政府指责巴基斯坦发动了袭击。
news.content0: Dozens of people have been killed in an air strike on a drug treatment centre in Afghanistan's capital that the Taliban government blamed on Pakistan.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 英伟达押注AI智能体将无处不在
news.title0: The world’s most valuable company just sent another signal that AI agents are going to be everywhere
news.content: 全球市值最高的公司英伟达发布一系列软硬件更新，全力押注能够为用户执行任务的AI智能体（AI Agent）的未来。
news.content0: Tech giant Nvidia, the world’s most valuable company and the poster child of the AI boom, is banking its future on the rise of AI agents.
news.author: CNN
